output.summary: Replace the SelectControl for pagination mode with a ToggleGroupControl for better UX. This is a single-file change in Archive.tsx: update the import to swap SelectControl for ToggleGroupControl/ToggleGroupControlOption (using the __experimental alias convention established across the codebase), and replace the SelectControl JSX with ToggleGroupControl containing two ToggleGroupControlOption children.

fileChanges.description: Replace SelectControl with ToggleGroupControl for pagination mode

designDecisions.question: Should the ToggleGroupControl include the __next40pxDefaultSize prop?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes. All existing ToggleGroupControl instances in this codebase (Form.tsx, Accordion.tsx, FullWidthMedia.tsx, etc.) include __next40pxDefaultSize. This ensures consistent sizing with other inspector panel controls and follows the WordPress 40px default size migration pattern.
